brief_summary: Two-column breakdown separating confirmed facts about Codex Micro from open questions as of the article's publish date. The Known column (coral checkmarks) lists four confirmed facts; the Unannounced column (muted dashed circles) lists four open questions, price chief among them. No numeric values are invented for the unknown column — it names the categories of missing information only.
